title: Dragon halberd
wikitext:
{{External|rs}} {{Infobox Item |name = Dragon halberd |image = [[File:Dragon halberd.png]] |release = [[20 September]] [[2004]] |update = Plague City Part 4 Released |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = Yes |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = Yes |options = Wield, Drop |examine = A dragon halberd. |value = 250000 |weight = 3.175 |exchange = Yes |id = 3204 }} [[File:Dragon halberd detail.png|left|130px]] The '''dragon halberd''' is a two-handed [[Weapons/Categories#Polearm|polearm]] and the third strongest [[halberd]] in ''[[Old School RuneScape]]'', and can only be equipped with 60 [[Attack]], 30 [[Strength]], and completion of the [[Regicide]] quest. Like all halberds, the dragon halberd can attack at a [[attack range|range]] of 2 tiles, making it useful as a [[melee]] weapon type that can be used to [[safespot]] monsters. Like most halberds, it has similar damage-per-second to its [[two-handed sword]] counterpart, due to bearing the same [[attack speed]] and similar [[Combat Stats|combat stats]]. Specifically, compared to the [[dragon 2h sword]], the dragon halberd trades 4 [[strength bonus]] in exchange for 3 additional slash [[attack bonus]] and some defensive bonuses, alongside the unique range bonus. Furthermore, its special attack, ''Sweep'', also bears resemblance to the dragon 2h sword's special, ''Powerstab'', because it hits multiple targets at once. It can be purchased at [[Tyras Camp]] after completion of Regicide for 325,000 coins, looted from The Gauntlet, received as a drop from Zulrah, or obtained as an uncommon reward from [[Clue scroll (master)|Master]] [[Treasure Trails]] caskets. As with most [[dragon equipment]] and all halberds, the dragon halberd '''cannot''' be made from raw materials using the [[Smithing]] skill. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = +70 |aslash = +95 |acrush = 0 |amagic = -4 |arange = 0 |dstab = -1 |dslash = +4 |dcrush = +5 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = +89 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = 0 |slot = 2h |speed = 7 |attackrange = 2 |combatstyle = Polearm |image = [[File:Dragon halberd equipped male.png|250px]] |altimage = [[File:Dragon halberd equipped female.png|250px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Polearm|speed=7|attackrange=2}} ==Special attack== [[File:Sweep.gif|frame|A player uses the dragon halberd's special attack, ''Sweep''.]] [[File:Sweep (large monster).gif|frame|A player uses the dragon halberd's special attack on a large monster.]] The dragon halberd has a [[special attack]] called ''Sweep'', consuming 30% of the player's special attack energy. In addition to a 10% damage boost, if used against "large" monsters (anything that is larger than 1x1, such as most [[Boss]] monsters), the special attack will deal an additional second hit onto them, although with 25% reduced accuracy. It can also hit 10 NPCs in a [[multi-combat area]] in a 3x1 area centred on the main target. In [[PvP]], it can only hit three players. This can deal very high damage in multi-combat situations where there are many enemies in close vicinity. ''Sweep''{{'}}s accuracy rolls against the opponent's slash defence roll. ==Item sources== {{Drop sources|Dragon halberd}} ===Shop locations=== {{Store locations list|Dragon halberd}} ==Products== {{Uses material list|Dragon halberd}} ==Used in recommended equipment== {{Used in recommended equipment|Dragon halberd}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 26 April 2019 |type = hotfix |change = The dragon halberd special attack was limited to three targets in PvP, to prevent unintentionally high [[experience]] rates.{{CiteTwitter|author=Old School RuneScape|url=https://twitter.com/OldSchoolRS/status/1121800161104019457|date=26 April 2019|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/101623|archivedate=28 May 2020|quote=A hotfix has been deployed to cap the Crystal halberd, Crystal halberd (i), Dragon halberd, and Dragon two handed sword special attacks to hit a maximum of 3 players in PvP. This is to prevent players achieving unintentionally high xp rates while a long term fix is discussed.}} }} {{Subject changes |date = 7 June 2018 |update = The Theatre of Blood |change = The dragon halberd's special attack used to only hit the main target on the central tile, but hit an unlimited amount of monsters on the two adjacent tiles. Now, it caps the maximum number of monsters to 10, but allows monsters standing on the same tile as the primary target to also be affected by the attack. }} {{Subject changes |daterange = 26 – 31 January 2005 |change = The item's inventory sprite was adjusted. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Dragon halberd detail (historical).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Dragon halberd detail.png|center|300x150px]] |- |[[File:Dragon halberd (historical).png|center]] |[[File:Dragon halberd.png|center]] |- |20 September 2004 ⁠–
26-31 January 2005 |26-31 January 2005 –
present |} ==Trivia== *When equipped, the small hook on the backside of the halberd blade is the same colour as the handle, but within the inventory and when dropped, it is red like the blade. ==References== {{reflist}} {{Slash weapons}} {{Dragon equipment}} [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]]
